#+JETPACS_APP: parity
#+TITLE: Parity Test App
#+JETPACS_ICON: verified
#+JETPACS_APP_FORMAT: 1
#+TODO: TODO DOING | DONE

* Board View
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: board
:GROUP_BY: TODO
:SCHEMA: %ITEM %TODO
:END:

* Calendar View
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: calendar
:DATE_FIELD: SCHEDULED
:SCHEMA: %ITEM %SCHEDULED
:END:

* Gallery View
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: gallery
:IMAGE_FIELD: IMAGE
:SCHEMA: %ITEM %IMAGE(Picture)
:END:

* Table View
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: table
:COLTYPES: text enum(A,B,C) text text
:END:
| Name | Status | Category | Effort |
|------+--------+----------+--------|
| Task | A      | Work     | 1:00   |

* Records View
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: records
:SCHEMA: %ITEM %EFFORT %CATEGORY
:END:
